svg.title: Hangman game flow diagram
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the full logic of the Hangman game from session setup to win/loss outcome and replay

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the session setup work in hangman?')
sendPrompt('How does the detail level affect the hangman drawing?')
sendPrompt('How does the multi-game session work?')
sendPrompt('What is the difference between human vs human and computer mode?')
sendPrompt('What is initialised at the start of each hangman round?')
sendPrompt('What does the player see each turn in hangman?')
g.text: Drawing, word blanks, lives, used letters

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What inputs can the player give in hangman?')
sendPrompt('What happens when the player quits hangman?')
sendPrompt('How does the hint system work in hangman?')
sendPrompt('How is the hint letter chosen?')
sendPrompt('How does hangman validate player input?')
sendPrompt('What happens if a letter was already guessed in hangman?')
sendPrompt('How does hangman check if a guessed letter is correct?')
sendPrompt('How are correct letters revealed in the word?')
sendPrompt('How does the hangman drawing grow with wrong guesses?')
sendPrompt('How does hangman decide if the game is over?')
